prompt: Edit image 1, a tactical map with various mech icons. Add a head icon on the right side of the green mech icons with the stylized vector mech head from image 2. Add a new unit icon to the top left map based on the detailed miniature figure style of the Gundam in image 3.
prompt_refined:
Edit `image 1`, a tactical map featuring various mech unit icons and terrain.
1.  Insert a new mech head icon into the empty grid cell located immediately to the right of the cluster of three green Zaku-style mech icons (approximately grid coordinate [18,6]). This new icon should be a smaller, top-down view representation of the stylized vector mech head from `image 2`, maintaining its distinct angular and colorful art style.
2.  Add a new mech unit icon into an empty grid cell in the top-left quadrant of the map (approximately grid coordinate [3,2]). This icon should depict a distinct mech unit rendered in the highly detailed, realistic miniature figure style, similar to the visual quality and rendering of the Gundam model shown in `image 3`, and scaled appropriately to fit the map grid.
objects: Various existing mech unit icons (e.g., Gundam head, Zaku-style, pink blob, dinosaur-like, yellow mech)
New stylized vector mech head icon (from `image 2`'s style), positioned to the right of the three green Zaku-style mech icons.
New highly detailed, realistic miniature-style mech unit icon (similar to the Gundam model in `image 3`), positioned in the top-left quadrant.
